userStories.title: Project Setup
userStories.description: Initialize VS Code extension project with TypeScript, package.json, tsconfig, eslint, and basic extension entry point that activates/deactivates cleanly.

userStories.title: Configuration Support
userStories.description: Implement a configuration reader that exposes the extension settings: enabled (bool), cooldownMs (number), commandMatchers (string[]), errorMatchers (string[]), volume (number 0-1).

userStories.title: Logger
userStories.description: Implement an output channel logger (faaaaah.logger) with log/info/warn/error methods used throughout the extension for trigger reasons and skipped cases.

userStories.title: Sound Player
userStories.description: Implement cross-platform sound playback using a bundled default .wav file: afplay on macOS, aplay/paplay on Linux, PowerShell SoundPlayer on Windows.

userStories.title: Command Classifier
userStories.description: Implement a command classifier that identifies watched terminal commands: npm run dev/build, pnpm dev/build, yarn dev/build, vite, next dev/build, react-scripts start/build. Must be configurable via commandMatchers setting.

userStories.title: Output Matcher
userStories.description: Implement output matching against configurable error patterns (errorMatchers). Patterns should match common React/Vite/Next.js error output lines.

userStories.title: Error Session State
userStories.description: Implement per-terminal error session tracking with cooldown to avoid repeated sound triggers for the same persistent error burst.

userStories.title: Terminal Monitor
userStories.description: Listen to VS Code terminal shell execution events (onDidStartTerminalShellExecution, onDidEndTerminalShellExecution) and read raw terminal output to drive the error detection pipeline.

userStories.title: Extension Commands
userStories.description: Register VS Code commands: faaaaah.testSound, faaaaah.enable, faaaaah.disable, faaaaah.showOutputLog, faaaaah.resetSessionState.

userStories.title: Extension Activation and Wiring
userStories.description: Wire all components in the activate() entry point. Ensure the extension deactivates cleanly (disposes subscriptions). Add a bundled default error sound file.
